rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND T. FONG & MILDRED FONG REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitionfers' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With With Prior Production Order; Request For Issue Sanctions; Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, October 31, 2007. Petitioner Cary Fong's motion to compel compliance with the prior order is granted in part. As the Court previously found that the diary entries regarding the subject property were not communications and therefore not privileged, respondent is ordered to provide un-redacted diary entries except for those entries that describe communications between respondent and any attorney. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Respondent shall provide the un-redacted records within 10 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)
